title: Virus X
description:
NOTICE: This game is currently in beta. Features, gameplay, visuals, and story content are still under active development and may change over time. Regular updates will introduce new content, improvements, bug fixes, and additional story chapters as development progresses.

Story Mode Overview:

Virus X is a first-person Action game where you must stop a virus from spreading any further. You’ll have someone on comms guiding you through everything, and you must survive while stopping the outbreak. Bloodthirsty creatures will try to stop you, but you must keep going—you must keep fighting. The human race depends on it.

Product Features• Single-Player Main Story — Play through the main story, which takes place in an abandoned facility located in a city where the virus is spreading. 

• Gameplay Features — This game uses W to move forward and S to move backward, and the mouse to turn. Press E to interact with items. Left mouse click to punch AND Right mouse click to counter while fighting in Third Person.
description_short: A brilliant yet unhinged scientist has engineered a revolutionary virus intended to cure humanity’s greatest limitations… beginning with the inability to regenerate damaged limbs. As Andrew, you must track down the doctor and stop his experiments before they spiral into a global catastrophe.
